name: Fatima Begum
bio: Talented graphic designer from Uttara. We met at a creative workshop and collaborate on side projects. Loves Bengali culture.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Studied engineering at BUET. Now works at a software company in Dhaka. We used to grab tea at TSC regularly.

name: Raihan Ahmed
bio: Grew up together in Sylhet. Passionate about cricket and photography. Recently moved to Chittagong.
